title: Sobhuza boxers excel at Eden champs
description: GEORGE NEWS - Sobhuza Boxing Club from...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Sobhuza Boxing Club from George took second place in the Eden Region Open Organisation Championship in Knysna last weekend.


> Seventy junior boxers from seven clubs attended the championship with seven clubs participating.


Three of the clubs came from Mossel Bay, one from Plettenberg Bay, two from Knysna and the Sobhuza Boxing Club from George.

The boxers, aged between 12 and 16, competed in the Cadet and Junior categories for boys and girls.

Hosted in collaboration with Knysna Municipality, the competition was held at Safe Hub in White Location, Knysna.

Special guests at the championships included Knysna Mayor Aubrey Tsengwa, Western Cape lightweight champion Mbuyisile Dukwane, acting sport director of Knysna Municipality Cheslyn Goldberg, German amateur boxing coach Mannfred Lutter and a former WBO International champion, Nqubela Gwazela.


> Dukwane's presence was a boost for the young boxers and added to an atmosphere of excitement.


Nkosikho Makalima, chairperson of Eden Boxing, praised the municipality for its role in the event and for giving the young boxers the opportunity to showcase their boxing skills.

He said they are looking forward to take the highly motivated kids to the Western Cape Championship in Cape Town on 24 and 25 August.

Results

Phakamisa Boxing Club (Knysna) took first place, Sobhuza Boxing Club (George) took second place and the third place went to Garden Route Academy.

Boxer of the tournament: Siphokuhle Mntu

Best male Cadet: Junior Mbuthuma

Best boxers in the boys' and girls' Junior category: Siphokuhle Mntu (Masibulele Boxing Club) and Imange Thethani (Garden Route Boxing Academy)

Best boxers in the boys' and girls' Cadet category: Junior Mbuthuma (Garden Route Boxing Academy) and Onako Bukuva (Pakamisa Boxing Club)

Club gold medal winners

Pakamisa Boxing Club

Imange Mpitimoiti

Luckyboy Makisi

Iminathi Quthu

Siwaphiwe Mlanjeni

Liyabona Thongo

Onako Bukuva

Ikhaya Boxing Club

Limise Madotyeni

Lawrance Mathe

Endinako Gamco

Kamvelihle Majova

Hlumelo Mkrola

Garden Route Boxing Club

Kwazi Kranqo

Junior Mbuthuma

Singalaka Mbuthuma

Zenixole Mntukwini

Owam Phakamile

Liyema Dlabathi

Lucia Maponopono

Sisonke Simahle

Imange Thethani

Imibongo Keyi

Sobhuza Boxing Academy

Siphesothando Vhala

Libongwe Nelani

Komogelo Menziwa

Siyamthanda Nxube

Anakhe Booi

Mbasa Buti

Ritumetsi Maphiri

Amyoli Tonono

Lithetha Nkindlo

Masibulele Boxing Club

Siphokuhle Mntu

Liyakhanya Magxala

Somqoba Boxing Academy

Siyaka Nyanga
